languages.text: Храм, найденный Вольным Торговцем в глубине корневой системы Заркова, становится тайным проклятием планеты. Каждые несколько лет барьер, удерживающий внутри Погонщиц, требует подпитки свежими силами псайканы. Со временем необходимость отправлять одного из псайкеров планеты в жертву барьеру и Погонщицам стала сакральной, и чудовища стали символом самой планеты и ее богатств.

The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Every few years, the barrier holding the Drovers inside needed to be reinforced with a new dose of psychic powers. Over time, the need to sacrifice one of the planet's psykers to the barrier and the Drovers became a sacred rite, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

Every few years, the barrier holding the Drovers inside needed to be reinforced with a new dose of psykana powers. Over time, the need to sacrifice one of the planet's psykers to the barrier and the Drovers became a sacred rite, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

languages.text: ザルコフの根系深くに、ローグ・トレーダーによって発見された寺院が、この惑星の秘密の呪いとなった。数年に一度、ドルーバーを閉じ込める障壁を強化するために、サイカーの力を注入する必要があった。時間とともに、惑星に住むサイカーを障壁とドルーバーに捧げる儀式が聖なるものとなり、その怪物は惑星そのものとその富の象徴となった。
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Every few years, the barrier holding the Drovers inside needed to be reinforced with a new dose of psykana powers. Over time, the need to sacrifice one of the planet's psykers to the barrier and the Drovers became a sacred rite, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの根系深くに、ローグ・トレーダーによって発見された寺院が、この惑星の秘密の呪いとなった。数年に一度、ドルーバーを閉じ込める障壁を強化するために、サイカーの力を注入する必要があった。時間とともに、惑星に住むサイカーを障壁とドルーバーに捧げる儀式が聖なるものとなり、その怪物は惑星そのものとその富の象徴となった。

languages.text: 行商浪人在扎尔科夫根系深处发现的神庙，成了这颗行星的秘密诅咒。每隔几年，就需要注入新的灵能力量，以加固困住拒生花的屏障。久而久之，将行星上的一名灵能者献祭给屏障与拒生花便成了一项神圣的仪式。而这些怪物，也成了行星本身及其财富的象征。
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Every few years, the barrier holding the Drovers inside needed to be reinforced with a new dose of psykana powers. Over time, the need to sacrifice one of the planet's psykers to the barrier and the Drovers became a sacred rite, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人在扎尔科夫根系深处发现的神庙，成了这颗行星的秘密诅咒。每隔几年，就需要注入新的灵能力量，以加固困住拒生花的屏障。久而久之，将行星上的一名灵能者献祭给屏障与拒生花便成了一项神圣的仪式。而这些怪物，也成了行星本身及其财富的象征。

languages.text: Le temple découvert par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} au cœur du système radiculaire de Zarkov devint la malédiction secrète de la planète. La barrière retenant les Chasseurs à l'intérieur devait être renforcée à quelques années d'intervalle avec un nouvel apport de pouvoirs de psykana. Au fil du temps, cette pratique devint un rite sacré consistant à sacrifier l'un des psykers de la planète à la barrière et aux Chasseurs. Les monstres, quant à eux, finirent par symboliser la planète elle-même et ses richesses.
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Every few years, the barrier holding the Drovers inside needed to be reinforced with a new dose of psykana powers. Over time, the need to sacrifice one of the planet's psykers to the barrier and the Drovers became a sacred rite, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

languages.text: El templo que encontró {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente en las profundidades de las raíces de Zarkov se convirtió en la maldición secreta del planeta. Cada pocos años, la barrera que mantenía a los Pastores encerrados requería una nueva dosis de energías psíquicas. Con el tiempo, la necesidad de sacrificar a uno de los psíquicos del planeta a la barrera y los Pastores se convirtió en un rito sagrado, y los monstruos pasaron a ser un símbolo del planeta y sus riquezas.
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Every few years, the barrier holding the Drovers inside needed to be reinforced with a new dose of psykana powers. Over time, the need to sacrifice one of the planet's psykers to the barrier and the Drovers became a sacred rite, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

traits.locale_text: El templo que encontró {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente en las profundidades de las raíces de Zarkov se convirtió en la maldición secreta del planeta. Cada pocos años, la barrera que mantenía a los Pastores encerrados requería una nueva dosis de energías psíquicas. Con el tiempo, la necesidad de sacrificar a uno de los psíquicos del planeta a la barrera y los Pastores se convirtió en un rito sagrado, y los monstruos pasaron a ser un símbolo del planeta y sus riquezas.

languages.text: Hür Tacir tarafından Zarkov'un kök sisteminin derinliklerinde bulunan tapınak, gezegenin gizli laneti hâline geldi. Birkaç yılda bir Çobanları içeride tutan bariyerin yeni bir ruhsezerlik gücü dozuyla güçlendirilmesi gerekiyordu. Zamanla gezegenin ruhsezerlerinden birini bariyere ve Çobanlara kurban etme ihtiyacı, kutsal bir ayine dönüştü. Yaratıklar, gezegenin kendisinin ve zenginliklerinin sembolü oldu.
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Every few years, the barrier holding the Drovers inside needed to be reinforced with a new dose of psykana powers. Over time, the need to sacrifice one of the planet's psykers to the barrier and the Drovers became a sacred rite, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

languages.text: Der {mf|vom Freihändler|von der Freihändlerin} im Wurzelsystem von Zarkov gefundene Tempel wurde zum heimlichen Fluch des Planeten. Alle paar Jahre musste die Barriere, die die Treiber im Tempel festhielt, durch frische psionische Energien verstärkt werden. Im Laufe der Zeit wurde die Opferung eines Psionikers für die Barriere und die Treiber ein heiliger Ritus. Gleichzeitig wurden die Monster ein Symbol des Planeten selbst und seiner Reichtümer.
